title: LeftField Toys | Hubble Bubble Bubble Machine - Automatic Bubble Maker for Kids - Outdoor and Garden Toy
features: POWERFUL AUTOMATIC BUBBLE MACHINE: Watch as hundreds of bubbles pour out every minute with the push of a button. A reliable, quiet, and efficient bubble machine for kids that brings instant joy.
SENSORY PLAY MUST-HAVE: The continuous flow of floating, shimmering bubbles offers children soothing visual stimulation, making this an exceptional sensory toy for calming and engaging play.
SAFE & TODDLER-FRIENDLY DESIGN: With a simple one-button operation with no sharp edges, this bubble machine is perfect for young children.

READY FOR GARDEN OR OUTDOOR FUN: Lightweight and portable, this bubble machine is ideal for outdoor birthday parties, barbecues, or just running around the garden. A true standout in the world of garden toys and outdoor toys.
PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION: Whether it’s a summer picnic, rainy-day indoor fun, or a playdate, this bubble maker brings excitement anywhere.
description: Product description Let the Hubble Bubble Bubble Machine from LeftField Toys transform any playtime into a bubble-filled wonderland. With a whisper-quiet motor and high-output bubble stream, it’s the perfect bubble machine for kids. Whether you’re searching for top-tier sensory toys, entertaining toddler toys, or lively outdoor toys, this machine checks every box. Set it in the garden, on the patio, or at a party - it’s the ultimate garden toy. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months. Small parts - Choking hazard. Do not aim at eves or face. For outdoor use only. Bubble solution not for human ingestion. In case of ingestion or if solution comes in contact with eyes, skin or hair; rinse thoroughly with clean water and seek medical attention if irritation persists. Bubble solutionds after use. Store away from young children. Adult supervision required at all times. Examine the toy may sain or stick to clothing or surfaces, protect play area before use. Wash harregularly. Discard or replace if damaged. Colour and contents may vary. Removeall packaging before giving to a child. Please retain this important information for future reference. Batteries should only be installed & replaced by an adult, Remove the battery door; shown in the diagram (note correct polarity). Replace battery door and tighten screw frmly (Be careful notusing a crosshead screwdriver (not included). Place batteries in the compartment ato overtighten).Battery safety information: Do not use batteries of different types orew & used batteries together. Remove exhausted batteries from the toy or during long periods of non-use.Non-rechargeable batteries are not to be recharged. Exhausted batteries are to beemoved from the toy. The supply terminals are not to be short-circuited.
